object.title: Tiny Bead
object.description: A small but precious detail of the huge masterpiece you are starting to paint.

insights.title: Quiet Beginning
insights.content: A true revolution of cell division is happening inside, though everything seems calm outside.

insights.title: Vitamins
insights.content: Folic acid is now the main building material for the nervous system.

object.title: Apple Seed
object.description: Hidden within this seed is the power of an entire garden that will bloom in the future.

insights.title: Heartbeat
insights.content: A tiny engine begins its work. It beats twice as fast as yours.

insights.title: Emotional Swing
insights.content: Sudden joy and tears are normal. Hormones are reshaping your world.

object.title: River Pearl
object.description: A hidden treasure forming in complete safety and warmth.

insights.title: Sensitivity
insights.content: Your sense of smell sharpens. Your body becomes the best detector for what is good and bad.

insights.title: Hydration
insights.content: Water helps increase blood volume. Sip small amounts throughout the day.

object.title: Glass Marble
object.description: Bright and transparent, like the children's laughter that will soon fill your home.

insights.title: Morning Shadow
insights.content: Nausea can strike at any time. Listen to your body: eat what it accepts.

insights.title: The Secret
insights.content: You carry a mystery known only to your body. Enjoy this privacy.

object.title: LEGO Brick
object.description: The first brick from which castles, cars, and whole worlds will be built.

insights.title: Expanding Space
insights.content: The uterus is the size of a grapefruit. Mild cramps are just signs of expansion.

insights.title: Walks
insights.content: Fresh air is the best cure for fatigue. A 20-minute walk works wonders.

object.title: Chess Pawn
object.description: A small figure that can become anyone. The strategy of life begins.

insights.title: Unique Traits
insights.content: The embryonic tail is gone. This is now a tiny human with unique facial features.

insights.title: Vivid Dreams
insights.content: Dreams may become strange and vivid. Your subconscious is processing fears and hopes.

object.title: Toy Car
object.description: Soon it will race across the carpet, and you will teach the rules of the road.

insights.title: Vital Organs
insights.content: Kidneys, liver, and brain are functioning. The foundation of health is laid.

insights.title: Comfort Wear
insights.content: The bump isn't visible yet, but tight jeans may feel restrictive. Switch to soft fabrics.

object.title: Pacifier
object.description: A symbol of calmness and quiet nights, which will surely come.

insights.title: Glow
insights.content: Hair might feel thicker and nails grow faster. Thank the hormones.

insights.title: First Meeting
insights.content: Time for the first ultrasound. You will hear the most important rhythm in the world.

object.title: First Wooden Block
object.description: The foundation of the tallest tower he will build in the nursery.

insights.title: Energy Surge
insights.content: The placenta has taken over. Nausea recedes, making way for energy to plan the future.

insights.title: Realization
insights.content: The shift from 'I am pregnant' to 'I am having a baby'. Allow yourself to dream.

object.title: Rubber Duck
object.description: A companion for fun baths and soap bubbles.

insights.title: Fingerprints
insights.content: Unique patterns are forming on tiny fingers. He is already one of a kind.

insights.title: Sharing News
insights.content: Many choose this time to tell friends. Do it in a way that feels right for you.

object.title: Christmas Ornament
object.description: A fragile miracle that makes the holiday special. Just like him.

insights.title: Expressions
insights.content: The baby is learning to frown and smile. He is practicing emotions.

insights.title: Golden Time
insights.content: The second trimester is here. Enjoy the return of your strength.

object.title: Favorite Mug
object.description: For warm cocoa on a rainy day when you read fairy tales to him.

insights.title: Hearing
insights.content: Ear bones have hardened. He hears the beating of your heart from the inside.

insights.title: Skin Care
insights.content: The bump is growing. Moisturizing helps avoid itching and stretch marks.

object.title: Bar of Soap
object.description: The scent of cleanliness, a soft towel, and the gentlest hugs after a bath.

insights.title: Active Growth
insights.content: Legs are now longer than arms. Proportions are evening out.

insights.title: Pregnancy Brain
insights.content: Forgetfulness is normal. Your brain focuses on the main thing, filtering out noise.

object.title: Game Controller
object.description: First games, first victories, and learning to play as a team with Dad.

insights.title: Skeleton
insights.content: Soft cartilage turns into bone. The baby is accumulating calcium.

insights.title: Sleep on Side
insights.content: Start getting used to sleeping on your side. It improves blood flow to the baby.

object.title: Paper Plane
object.description: Dreams launched into flight. Lightness and faith that he will fly high.

insights.title: Fluttering
insights.content: You might feel the first movements, like the fluttering of butterfly wings.

insights.title: Connection
insights.content: Involve the dad. Let him talk to the bump too.

object.title: Sunglasses
object.description: Bright summer, the beach, and protection for the most curious eyes.

insights.title: Vernix
insights.content: The skin is covered with a protective coating. Nature's own cream.

insights.title: Naming
insights.content: Start making lists. Try saying names out loud.

object.title: Teddy Bear
object.description: The loyal friend he will fall asleep with in the dark.

insights.title: Equator
insights.content: Halfway there. The uterus is at the level of the navel.

insights.title: Ultrasound
insights.content: Time to see the baby in detail. You might find out the gender.

object.title: Pencil Case
object.description: First drawings, scribbles, and family portraits on the fridge.

insights.title: Taste Buds
insights.content: He tastes the amniotic fluid. Your menu shapes his habits.

insights.title: Kicks
insights.content: Now they are real kicks. He is exploring the boundaries of his world.

object.title: Baby Bottle
object.description: A symbol of care and nourishment. A time when you are needed most.

insights.title: Touch
insights.content: He touches his face and the umbilical cord. Exploring himself by touch.

insights.title: Photoshoot
insights.content: The bump looks very neat now. A good time for photos.

object.title: First Sneaker
object.description: For those very first unsure steps towards mom.

insights.title: Lung Practice
insights.content: He 'breathes' fluid, training chest muscles for the first cry.

insights.title: Music
insights.content: He might move to the rhythm of music. Dance slowly.

object.title: Toy Microphone
object.description: Loud songs, home concerts, and complete freedom of expression.

insights.title: Viability
insights.content: An important milestone. Modern medicine can already help the baby survive outside.

insights.title: Glucose Test
insights.content: Important to check sugar levels. Caring for both of you.

object.title: Baseball Glove
object.description: The ability to catch luck and be part of a team.

insights.title: Capillaries
insights.content: Skin is turning pink as it fills with tiny vessels.

insights.title: Rest
insights.content: Your back might get tired. Yoga or a pool can help relieve tension.

object.title: Foldable Umbrella
object.description: Protection from bad weather and jumping in puddles in rain boots.

insights.title: Eyes Open
insights.content: Eyelids open. He blinks for the first time and sees light through the walls.

insights.title: Voices
insights.content: He recognizes dad's voice. Let dad read stories aloud.

object.title: Lunchbox
object.description: Care you pack for school. Notes with love inside.

insights.title: Final Stretch
insights.content: Entering the third trimester. The home stretch.

insights.title: Dreams
insights.content: Anxious dreams about birth are normal. It's the brain rehearsing.

object.title: Sketchpad
object.description: Space for imagination where he can draw his own world.

insights.title: Growth
insights.content: The baby is gaining weight fast. It's getting tight, kicks feel stronger.

insights.title: Doctor Visits
insights.content: Meetings will become more frequent. Every two weeks now.

object.title: Ukulele
object.description: A small instrument for big songs and soulful evenings.

insights.title: Thermoregulation
insights.content: The brain learns to control body temperature. Preparing for the world of air.

insights.title: Nutrition
insights.content: You need more calcium. The baby is taking it for his bones.

object.title: Winter Hat
object.description: Warmth for long walks hand in hand through crisp snow.

insights.title: Lanugo
insights.content: The fuzz on the body starts to disappear. Skin becomes smooth.

insights.title: Nesting
insights.content: A strong urge to clean the house. Do it without overworking.

object.title: Soccer Ball
object.description: First goal, scraped knee, and the pride of a winner.

insights.title: Brain Work
insights.content: Neural connections form at immense speed. He is processing information.

insights.title: Breathing
insights.content: Shortness of breath is normal. The uterus presses on the diaphragm. Move slower.

object.title: Stack of Books
object.description: Bedtime stories that will teach him kindness and courage.

insights.title: Position
insights.content: Many babies turn head down now, preparing for the exit.

insights.title: Courses
insights.content: Good time to learn about breathing techniques for labor.

object.title: Sleeping Bag
object.description: Camping, starry skies, and the most honest conversations by the fire.

insights.title: Immunity
insights.content: You are passing antibodies to him. His first shield against viruses.

insights.title: Hospital Bag
insights.content: Start packing. Calmness comes with readiness.

object.title: Violin
object.description: A sensitive soul, a sense of beauty, and persistence in learning.

insights.title: Maturation
insights.content: Lungs are almost ready. If born now, he would need very little help.

insights.title: Fatigue
insights.content: The second wave of tiredness. Allow yourself a nap.

object.title: Bike Helmet
object.description: Safety in the first big adventures. You will always be there to catch him.

insights.title: Weight Gain
insights.content: He gains 200-300 grams a week. It's getting cozy in there.

insights.title: Birth Plan
insights.content: Discuss your wishes with the doctor. But be flexible.

object.title: Keyboard
object.description: First written stories, code, or letters to friends.

insights.title: Dropping
insights.content: The bump might drop. Breathing gets easier, walking gets harder.

insights.title: Full Term
insights.content: From next week, the pregnancy is considered full term. You are at the finish line.

object.title: Camera
object.description: The ability to see beauty in the world and capture the best moments.

insights.title: Ready
insights.content: He can be born any day now. His systems work autonomously.

insights.title: Logistics
insights.content: Check the route to the hospital and charge your phone.

object.title: Skateboard
object.description: Courage to fall and get back up. Balance and freedom.

insights.title: Practice Contractions
insights.content: They might become more frequent. If irregular, it's just practice.

insights.title: Waiting
insights.content: Every call starts with 'Is it time?'. Keep your Zen.

object.title: Globe
object.description: The whole world at his feet. He is yet to discover continents and oceans.

insights.title: Quiet
insights.content: The baby might get a bit quieter before the start. Saving energy.

insights.title: Rest
insights.content: Sleep, read, watch movies. This time is just for you.

object.title: School Backpack
object.description: Inside will be the first 'A' grades, secret notes, and big discoveries.

insights.title: Day X
insights.content: Due date is just a guide. The baby will choose his perfect moment.

insights.title: Meeting
insights.content: Soon you will look into the eyes you've been creating for 9 months.

object.title: Alarm Clock
object.description: Symbol of new time. Time will now be measured in moments of happiness.

insights.title: Bonus Time
insights.content: He's too cozy in there. Doctors are monitoring his condition.

insights.title: Patience
insights.content: You are the most patient mom. Just a little bit left.

object.title: Gift Box
object.description: The most important gift of your life is ready to be unwrapped.

insights.title: Induction
insights.content: Maybe he needs a little help. Trust the doctors.

insights.title: New Chapter
insights.content: Pregnancy ends, Life begins.
